title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: The Retirement Plan
subTitle: When their involvement with the wrong people puts her and her family at risk, Ashley turns to her estranged father for help, who is living a retired life in the Cayman Islands.

title: Alpha
subTitle: Keda, the young son of a tribe chief, is accidentally left behind and must survive in the wilderness. He then encounters an injured wolf abandoned by its pack and the two form a bond.

title: The Walk
subTitle: Philippe Petit, a French street performer, dreams of performing daring stunts. He attempts to walk between the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center in New York on a tightrope.

title: Father Stu
subTitle: Upon suffering in an accident, an aspiring actor receives a vision guiding him to change his lifestyle. However, when he sets off to pursue the priesthood, a rare disease brings him more challenges.

title: Terminator Salvation
subTitle: Judgement Day has occurred and skynet has all but exterminated modern society. Now John Connor leads the resistance against skynet but is unsure of victory until he encounters Marcus Wright.

title: Kraven the Hunter
subTitle: Prepped to be the successor of his father's drug empire, a near-death experience alters Sergei's physicality. Sergei now treads the path of vengeance as he hunts criminals.

title: Anaconda
subTitle: A documentary crew, who are on a mission to find a tribe named Shirishamas, help a snake hunter when they find him stranded. However, he forces them to risk their lives and hunt down an anaconda.

title: Don't Breathe 2
subTitle: Norman, a visually challenged navy veteran, lives in quiet solace with his foster daughter, Phoenix. However, he is forced to tap into his darker instincts when Phoenix is abducted.

title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
subTitle: Miles Morales travels the spider-verse and meets a league of spider-people as he fights a new enemy, the Spot. But upon trying to change his canon event, he is pitted against the other Spider-Men.

title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
subTitle: Ben and Zoey find themselves trapped in a series of deadly escape rooms with four others. They try to survive and find a way out as they slowly discover that they have played the game before.

title: Ghost Rider
subTitle: Motorcycle stuntman Johnny Blaze gives up his soul to save his father and becomes the Ghost Rider to fight against Blackheart, the son of Mephistopheles, the devil himself.

title: The Karate Kid
subTitle: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
subTitle: The Spengler family must join forces with the original Ghostbusters to stop an ancient evil force from refreezing the world, whilst protecting their iconic New York City firehouse headquarters.

title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
subTitle: Teenager Tsubasa Shiki moves from Tokyo to the island of Hokkaido. There, he meets Minami Fuyuki, a girl unlike any he has met before.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Life
subTitle: As astronauts discover the first evidence of extra-terrestrial life on Mars, they begin realising that the life form is extremely intelligent and hostile.

title: The Equalizer
subTitle: Robert McCall gives up violence and wishes to lead a quiet life. However, brutal events force him to take up the fight for justice once again.

title: Vantage Point
subTitle: An unknown sniper attempts to assassinate the President of the United States during a tour in Spain and a handful of individuals close to the event recount it from their unique perspectives.

title: Bloodshot
subTitle: A soldier who died on duty is resurrected and given superhuman abilities by the RST Corp. But soon he realises the truth about his past and his resurrection and sets out to get revenge.

title: When a Stranger Calls
subTitle: Jill, a teenage babysitter, gets anxious when she starts receiving ominous anonymous calls. However, nothing could prepare for the horror she faces when she finds out where the calls are coming from.

title: A-X-L
subTitle: Miles befriends A-X-L, a robotic dog, when he manages to activate its owner-pairing technology. However, Miles's life takes an unusual turn when A-X-L's creators come searching for it.

title: Venom
subTitle: A group of friends find themselves running for their very lives from Ray Sawyer, a reanimated corpse possessed by 13 evil souls, who has vicious plans for them.

title: 2 Guns
subTitle: Two undercover agents, Robert and Michael, aim to expose Manny 'Papi' Greco, a drug lord. Unaware of each other's true identities, the two get into trouble when they finally meet Papi.

title: Hancock
subTitle: A hard-living superhero who has fallen out of favor with the public enters into a questionable relationship with the wife of the public relations professional who's trying to repair his image.
Jackson Curtis, a discontented writer, battles against all odds to keep his family secure when a series of apocalyptic calamities threaten to decimate humankind.

title: Bullet Train
subTitle: Ladybug, a professional assassin, is assigned to retrieve a briefcase from a bullet train. Soon, he finds himself battling many other killers who board the same train but with a different objective.

title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
subTitle: The Mitchells, a dysfunctional family, must fight a robot apocalypse amidst their much-awaited road trip to save humanity.

title: Jumanji: The Next Level
subTitle: After Spencer goes missing, his team of confidantes comes back to Jumanji to go to the undiscovered regions and support him in escaping the world's most lethal game.

title: My Tiny Senpai
subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: The Man From Toronto
subTitle: A struggling entrepreneur plans a surprise for his wife's birthday, but due to a twist of fate, he gets caught in the middle of an operation to apprehend an assassin.

title: XXX
subTitle: The US government recruits extreme sports athlete Xander Cage to infiltrate a Russian criminal ring, which is plotting the destruction of the world.

title: The Karate Kid
subTitle: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

title: Zombieland: Double Tap
subTitle: Columbus, Tallahassee, Wichita and Little Rock set out on a mission to protect the rest of humanity by fighting evolved zombies while also battling their own internal demons.

title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
subTitle: A genetically modified anaconda and a giant crocodile escape captivity and enter a nearby lake. When the two massive creatures fight, the sheriff tries to prevent the town from being destroyed.

title: Armored
subTitle: Ty Hackett takes up a job in the same company where his father worked before he died. His mentor Mike convinces him to be a part of the robbery of two armoured trucks, but their plan goes haywire.

title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
subTitle: Mike and Marcus face their toughest case yet as their late captain's reputation hangs in the balance. Subsequently, they unravel a complex web of cartel connections in a high-stakes mission.

title: The Water Horse
subTitle: Young Angus Mac Morrow discovers a mysterious egg that grows up to be the Loch Ness monster. As they form a strong relationship, the boy's family refuses to believe in the creature's existence.

title: Battle: Los Angeles
subTitle: Michael Nantz, a Marine staff sergeant, renders his services again, soon after his retirement. He and his platoon have to save the city of Los Angeles from alien invaders.

title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
subTitle: A single mother and her two children move into a farmhouse inherited from her estranged father. As they settle in, they discover their associations with Ghostbusters.

title: Hotel Transylvania
subTitle: Count Dracula runs a high-end resort for monsters and is overprotective of his daughter, Mavis. When Johnny, a human, enters the hotel, Count Dracula tries to prevent Mavis from falling for him.

title: A Few Good Men
subTitle: A lawyer from the US military safeguards two US marines who are charged for killing a fellow marine and a colonel turns into the prime suspect.

title: Uncharted
subTitle: Recruited by Victor, street-smart Nathan steps into a race for the lost treasure of Ferdinand Magellan. However, a corrupt billionaire and an evil mercenary also have the same goal.

subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.
